title: spex tileset manifest (tileset.json)
description: Written by spex-tiler for both pipelines (literal point clouds via `spex convert`, and graph layouts via `spex graph-layout`). Describes the octree: root bounds, the coordinate offset applied to every point, and one entry per octree node with its own bounds/point count. Point data itself lives in octree/<node-id>.bin, a small binary format (not JSON, so not schema'd here) — see CLAUDE.md's "Tileset format" section: u32 LE point count, then per point 3x f32 LE position + 3x u8 RGB.

offset.description: Subtracted from every point's original coordinate before writing. All bounds/positions in this file (and in a sibling nodes.json, if present) are already in this offset-relative frame.

pointCount.description: Total points across the whole tileset — equal to the sum of every node's own pointCount, since nodes are non-overlapping (each point belongs to exactly one node).

id.description: Octal path from the root ("r", "r0", "r03", ...) — this is spex-core's octree node-id scheme, unrelated to graph.json's node ids.
